settings.hero_sub: We are a family of dog lovers, dedicated to natural ingredients, honest quality, and a mission that reaches from American homes to the Himalayan highlands.
settings.mission_text:
At Prime Pet Food, we believe your dog deserves exactly what nature intended — nothing more, nothing less. That conviction shapes every chew we craft, every ingredient we source, and every relationship we build with our customers.

We're not just a business. We are fellow dog lovers who understand what it means to have a furry member of the family.
settings.value_1_desc: Our treats and chews are crafted from nature's finest — no artificial additives, no fillers. Only wholesome, organic ingredients your dog's body was built to enjoy.
settings.value_2_desc: Our roots are in American soil. As a family business, we hold dear the values of trust, integrity, and the kind of care you simply can't factory-scale.
settings.value_3_desc: Every product is meticulously sourced and tested. When you choose Prime Pet Food, you're choosing a standard that careful sourcing and quality checks support.
settings.value_4_desc: From the high Himalayas to your doorstep, we trace every ingredient to ensure ethical, sustainable practices at every step of the supply chain.
settings.story_caption: Your pets are cherished family members. We treat them that way.
settings.story_heading: Born from Love, Built on Trust
settings.story_body_1: We started Prime Pet Food with a single belief: that dogs deserve the same thoughtful, wholesome care we give ourselves. Our team consists of devoted animal lovers who've experienced firsthand the joy — and responsibility — of caring for a dog.
settings.story_body_2: We curate only the best natural chews and treats, sourced from trusted, ethical suppliers. Our Himalayan Yak Chews are handcrafted using a centuries-old tradition — no shortcuts, no compromise — just pure, long-lasting nourishment your dog will love.
settings.pillars_intro: These aren't just selling points. They're the commitments we make to every dog owner who trusts us with their pet's wellbeing.
settings.pillar_1_desc: Every product passes rigorous quality checks. We meticulously source, test, and hand-select what makes it to your door — because your pet deserves nothing less than the best.
settings.pillar_2_desc: Your trust is our most valuable asset. Our knowledgeable team is always here — whether you need advice, have a question, or need help with your order. We treat every customer like family.
settings.pillar_3_desc: Our Yak Chews are made using a centuries-old tradition from the highlands of the Himalayas — slow-smoked, hardened naturally, and free from any artificial processing.
settings.pillar_4_title: A Community, Not Just a Brand
settings.pillar_4_desc: When you shop with us, you join a community of passionate pet lovers. We share your commitment to giving dogs a healthier, happier life — and we grow together.
settings.cause_body: Every purchase you make does more than nourish your dog. We donate 1% of our profits to support education for children in the remote villages of the Himalayas — communities that are underserved but full of potential. When you choose Prime Pet Food, you become part of something larger.
settings.promise_1_text: Same-day processing on most orders. Your dog shouldn't have to wait.
settings.promise_2_text: On orders over $30. No surprise fees at checkout.
settings.promise_3_text: Your payment and personal data are always protected.
settings.promise_4_text: Easy returns and hassle-free refunds — always.
settings.cta_heading: Your Dog Deserves the Very Best
settings.cta_body: Explore our collection of premium Himalayan Yak Chews and natural treats — crafted with love, backed by quality, and trusted by pet parents.
